import.title: Import employees
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV or Excel file with employees for a company.
import.noCompanies: No active companies. Create one before importing.
import.companyHelp: All employees in the file will be added to this company. The department in the file must match an existing workplace.
import.fileHelp: CSV with comma or semicolon separator, or Excel (.xlsx) file. UTF-8 for diacritics.
import.fileFormatHelp: What format does the file need?
import.issueWorkplaceNotFound: Department doesn't match an existing workplace at this company
import.warningNoDepartment: No department — employee will be created without assignment
import.warningDuplicateEmployee: Duplicate within file (same name or email)
import.skipDuplicates: Skip duplicates (employees already in the cabinet)
import.mappingAiNote: Column mapping is auto-suggested. Verify before importing.
import.errorParse: Couldn't read the file. Check the format and try again.
import.diffLeavingNote: Employees not in this file may have left or this may be a partial roster upload.
import.diffFirstImportDesc: all {count} employees will be added to this company.

error_already_accepted.title: Account already activated
